name: BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Name Patterns
notes: This Building Block triggers when a cryptocurrency mining threat name is detected.
bb_references: BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Name Patterns on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: AV/AM, BB:DeviceDefinition: IDS / IPS
when an event matches any of the following BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Names
when any of Threat Name (custom) match .*?(?i)mine|coin|bit|btc|crypto.*?
TD_list: APPLY BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Name Patterns on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: AV/AM, BB:DeviceDefinition: IDS / IPS
AND NOT when an event matches any of the following BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Names
AND when any of Threat Name (custom) match .*?(?i)mine|coin|bit|btc|crypto.*?
